emergency_definition: An active sprinkler discharge or a fire alarm going off.
emergency_routing_rules: Route emergencies to the on-call technician at 214-555-0199.
call_transfer_rules: If the on-call technician does not pick up within 60 seconds, inform the caller that someone will call them back shortly.
integration_constraints: Use ServiceTrade, but never create sprinkler jobs automatically; these must be handled manually.
after_hours_flow_summary: Filter calls based on emergency definition. Emergencies are routed to a specific on-call technician with a 60-second failover to a callback promise. Non-emergencies are held until the next business day.
questions_or_unknowns: Full street address, specific timezone (assumed Central), and the specific flow for handling calls during standard office hours.
notes: The company uses ServiceTrade for job management but requires manual intervention for sprinkler-related tasks.
